title: Cobblemon Platinum (by Dimy)
description: Cobblemon Platinum is a feature-packed modpack that turns Minecraft into a true Pokémon adventure! This includes legendaries, custom structures, gym battles and more! It’s the ultimate way to play!
body:
# Introduction
Hey wassup guys! Welcome to Cobblemon Platinum!

You might recognize this modpack from a video I made!
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/RTjVqB0uwy4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Description
Cobblemon Platinum is a complete Pokémon-style overhaul for Minecraft powered by Cobblemon and enhanced with custom spawns, legendary encounters, immersive structures, and modded quality-of-life features! You can battle for gym badges, hunt for mythicals, or build your dream team! Cobblemon Platinum aims to fully transform your Cobblemon world into a real Pokémon adventure!

# Features
- Fully integrated AllTheMons legendary & mythical support
  
- Custom structures and hand-crafted spawn biomes

- Challenging trainer battles & badge-style gym system

- Essential QoL mods (minimap, inventory tweaks, optimizations)

- Encounter Pokémon like Zekrom, Hoopa, Rayquaza and more!

Cobblemon Platinum delivers the ultimate Pokémon x Minecraft experience!
